query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750008, 'What does "genre" refer to in biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["The author''s name","The type or category of literature","The date of writing","The original language"]', 'The type or category of literature', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'Why is recognizing genre essential for accurate interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["It makes reading easier","Different types of literature communicate meaning differently","It is not essential","Genre is the same for all books"]', 'Different types of literature communicate meaning differently', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What is a key characteristic of historical narrative?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is always allegorical","It reports events that actually occurred","It is pure fiction","It contains no theology"]', 'It reports events that actually occurred', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What literary feature characterizes Hebrew poetry?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rhyme and meter","Parallelism","Prose structure","Dialogue only"]', 'Parallelism', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What does prophetic literature include?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only foretelling","Only forth-telling","Both forth-telling and foretelling","Neither"]', 'Both forth-telling and foretelling', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What are the epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["Historical narratives","Occasional letters addressing specific situations","Poetry collections","Prophetic visions"]', 'Occasional letters addressing specific situations', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What are the Gospels described as?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pure biography","Theological biographies of Jesus","Fiction","Poetry"]', 'Theological biographies of Jesus', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'According to Hebrews 1:1, how did God speak?', 'multiple_choice', '["In one way only","In various ways","Through dreams only","Through angels only"]', 'In various ways', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What does apocalyptic literature use extensively?', 'multiple_choice', '["Plain language","Symbolic imagery","Historical facts only","Legal codes"]', 'Symbolic imagery', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'What happens when we misidentify genre?', 'multiple_choice', '["Better understanding","Misinterpretation","No effect","Deeper insight"]', 'Misinterpretation', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750008, 'Choose one biblical genre and explain how its unique characteristics should affect how we interpret it.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
